title: psephellus arpensis
intro: Psephellus arpensis, also known as Golden Scabious, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It belongs to the daisy family and is known for its vibrant yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, Psephellus arpensis is often used as a tea or tincture to promote digestive health, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system.
